channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix and Match $4.99 Menu
item.description: Choose up to 10 half-portion soups, sandwiches, or salads at roughly 40% off regular prices — one side per order included. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Revived fan-favorite soccer-season bundle: a large order of boneless wings plus sides at the $16.99 Meal Deal price. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu
item.description: Pick 3-piece Signature Chicken, 3-piece Tenders, a Chicken Sandwich, or 8-piece Butterfly Shrimp for $5 each — order in store, online, or in app. (Through August 30, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza Any Crust
item.description: Any pizza with any crust — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — and up to 7 toppings for $9.99 when selected online or in app. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders
item.description: Any Arby's Slider is just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time — no code required. (Limited time)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Build a meal for $5 daily at Burger King — a solid everyday value with your choice of sandwich and sides. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: The Luxe Cravings Box packs a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Crunchy Taco, chips and nacho cheese sauce, and a medium drink for $5.99 via app. (Ongoing)

item.title: KFC: 5 Tenders for $5 Digital Deal
item.description: Get 5 KFC Chicken Tenders for $5 when you order digitally through the app at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: IHOP: $6 Value Menu
item.description: IHOP's $6 Value Menu offers pancakes, omelettes, and other diner staples at a flat $6 price point — no app required. (Ongoing)

item.title: Del Taco: Value Menu Under $2
item.description: Del Taco's Value Menu features Bean and Cheese Burritos and other items frequently priced under $2 at participating locations. (Ongoing)
